title: GCF: A Token-Optimized Wire Format for Structured LLM Interactions
description: 1,300+ LLM evaluations across 10 models and 3 providers demonstrate that GCF achieves 90.7% comprehension accuracy (four models at 100%) where JSON averages 53.6% and TOON averages 68.5%. GCF achieves 5/5 generation validity on every frontier model. TOON's official decoder rejects LLM-generated output on 7 of 9 models. GCF uses 79% fewer input tokens than JSON and wins all 6 datasets on TOON's own benchmark.
